name: event-mutation
title: Event wiring — UI action → service mutation → optimistic update
description: Pattern for wiring a user-initiated action (send message, save preferences) to a service-backed mutation (Data Connect connector call), including optimistic update + error handling. Pure pattern entry — no component source.

cena.whenToUse: Any UI action that mutates server state. Primary use cases: sendMessage (Messages compose-bar), updatePreferences (Profile save), submitFeedback.

phases.description: User triggers the action (button click, form submit). Component receives the event via output().
Component writes the new state to its local signal IMMEDIATELY (don't wait for server). Flag the item as pending if list-shape; replace the visible state if detail-shape.
Component calls the service method; service calls the Data Connect connector (sendMessage(), updatePreferences()). Awaited or subscribed.
On success: replace the pending/optimistic state with the server-confirmed result. On failure: roll back (remove the pending item / restore previous state) AND surface an error to the user.

gotchas: Generate client-side temp ids with crypto.randomUUID() (or similar); never reuse array indices, never use empty strings
The pending flag is part of the item's shape, not an external Set lookup — keeps the @for track-by stable when reconciling
Error handling MUST roll back the optimistic write — failing to roll back is a silent state divergence between client and server
Don't conflate UI-error display (toast / inline message) with logging — emit both. The user needs to know it failed; we need to see why later.

preferenceLedgerRows.name: signal input()/output() I/O
preferenceLedgerRows.applies: actions emit via output(); state updates via signal.update()

preferenceLedgerRows.name: Data Connect contract shape
preferenceLedgerRows.applies: mutations call connector methods (sendMessage, updatePreferences) — see data-connect-binding (deferred)

preferenceLedgerRows.name: Behavior primitives as signals (not IIFE)
preferenceLedgerRows.applies: mutation flow is re-expressed in signals, not imported as a behavior IIFE

references: Andrey's anchor — immediate-persist (relevant to cart): cena-health-spark/patients/src/app/meals/meals.component.ts changeQuantity (persist-on-change). Audit-noted cart product-rule open question; out of scope for E1/E2 (Messages + Profile don't have this controversy in the same shape)
In-catalog cross-references: list-stream (for optimistic-list reconciliation), detail-view (for optimistic-section reconciliation)
cena.ownership: Cena-authored 2026-05-28 — no upstream lineage; explicitly references the cart-persist-timing open question without bringing it into this slice's scope
